meta.title: Air Force Basic Training - Foundation Building - Week 2
meta.description:
Week 2 of Air Force Basic Training involves building on the foundations of the previous week. Academic classes move onto the importance of healthy living and fitness as well as classes on drill formations. 
The second PT evaluation occurs this week with an emphasis on improving from the first evaluation. Get training advice from former Drill Instructors and recruits delivered to your app every week. 

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?
Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting that training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
